species: Here, we study a member of the MCM protein family in the protist Tetrahymena thermophila.
cell_type: Both proteins localized only to the germline nucleus during meiotic prophase.
sample_source: Wild-type Tetrahymena thermophila strains B2086 (mating type II) and Cu428 (mating type VII) were obtained from the Tetrahymena Stock Center at Cornell University.
